entry.title: 3D Printed VR Ball
entry.summary: Made with Autodesk Maya/Fusion and brought into Unreal Engine. Download the 3D model now to have a ball in VR! Printed with Anycubic Photon S 3D printer Lego figure for scale. He loves his custom 1:10 scale Tundra Trackers Old prototypes. The first version (white)…
entry.content:
Made with Autodesk Maya/Fusion and brought into Unreal Engine. Download the 3D model now to have a ball in VR!

Printed with Anycubic Photon S 3D printer

Lego figure for scale. He loves his custom 1:10 scale Tundra Trackers

Old prototypes. The first version (white) was too thick and covered the sensors too much. The 2nd version was too thin. The third was just right

Left: Valve released 3D models showing the area the tracking sensors cannot see, for creating accessories that don't interfere with tracking

Right: I created the same type of model for the Tundra Tracker using Autodesk Fusion. Download here. The tracker 3D model was created by Tundra

entry.title: Living Room Re-Creation in Half Life: Alyx
entry.summary: Modeled using Autodesk Maya and Adobe Substance/Photoshop. Click Here to play mod Kotaku and 80.lv articles :D
entry.content:
Modeled using Autodesk Maya and Adobe Substance/Photoshop. Click Here to play mod

Kotaku and 80.lv articles :D

entry.title: Games Made in Dreams for Playstation
entry.summary: Playable on Playstation 4/5 in Dreams at https://indreams.me/GrhmRst The first game is Nostalgia Maze. Compete against 363 players to get the best time. My best time is 1min 6sec. Tilt your controller to guide your ball through the maze. There are checkpoints at each number,…
entry.content:
Playable on Playstation 4/5 in Dreams at https://indreams.me/GrhmRst

The first game is Nostalgia Maze. Compete against 363 players to get the best time. My best time is 1min 6sec. Tilt your controller to guide your ball through the maze. There are checkpoints at each number, so cheating is impossible. 

 

The 2nd game is Hurricade. This was part of the Arcade gamejam. Press X at just the right moment to win the jackpot. As your score rises, the machine opens to reveal another prizes that you can now afford. All the prizes float in front of you inside a hurricane. After your game head to the store to choose your prizes.

Both are remixable (ie. they're open-source) and stand-alone Contraptions are available, so you can place a labyrinth game, neon lights, or arcade machine inside your creations.

entry.title: Workspace Comparisons

entry.title: Mixed Reality Robo Recall Mod
entry.summary: A room-scale cover-based mod with no need to teleport. Use power-ups, grenades, whips, and more to defeat 5 waves of enemies before your final showdown with Odin. Here's the Unlimited Ammo power-up in action: Downloads: Full Mod Lightsaber, for use in any level: Replace Pistol…
entry.content:
A room-scale cover-based mod with no need to teleport. Use power-ups, grenades, whips, and more to defeat 5 waves of enemies before your final showdown with Odin.

Here's the Unlimited Ammo power-up in action:

Downloads:

Full Mod

Lightsaber, for use in any level:

Replace Pistol

Replace Shotgun

entry.title: Living Room Comparisons
entry.summary: I remade my living room then blew a hole in the wall. Textures are made using Substance Painter.
entry.content: I remade my living room then blew a hole in the wall. Textures are made using Substance Painter.

entry.title: Mixed Reality Bedroom
entry.summary: Click here to download my Snoo character with headset. Portal 2 gun can be found here Thanks for checking out my room!

entry.title: My First 3D Print
entry.summary: Here's my 3D-printed Oculus Rift made for the Reddit vinyl figure. I simplified a model from VRcover.com and made the facial interface fit the toy. The rest is made from string and ribbon. Original Print. Only cost $6 on Shapeways Also bought a 3D-printed tree…
entry.content:
Here's my 3D-printed Oculus Rift made for the Reddit vinyl figure. I simplified a model from VRcover.com and made the facial interface fit the toy. The rest is made from string and ribbon.

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

Original Print. Only cost $6 on Shapeways

Also bought a 3D-printed tree based on Darwin's drawing

Cat for scale :D Thanks for checking out my print! Back to Reddit

entry.title: Workspace Comparisons
entry.summary: Here are some comparison pictures of my actual/VR workspace: The current look is inspired by Berlin Flat on the UE4 marketplace My workspace is in my closet I eliminated cables and other unnecessary things that I won't be touching in the virtual environment So many…
entry.content:
Here are some comparison pictures of my actual/VR workspace:

The current look is inspired by Berlin Flat on the UE4 marketplace

My workspace is in my closet

I eliminated cables and other unnecessary things that I won't be touching in the virtual environment

So many input devices; Touchscreen monitor, Wacom tablet, trackball mouse, racing wheel, controllers


Slimmed down G27 racing setup. Used a picture of Palmer Luckey and the Portal colors to change things up

My current project is a life drawing studio. I use the trackball mouse to rotate the model and sun, and my Wacom tablet to draw. I play music using 3D audio coming from the speakers

Character models are taken from a 3DS game

 

Thankfully Tomodachi Life for 3DS had a high poly cat that looked just like mine :P

much poly so realism

Join the discussion on Reddit

entry.title: Recreating workspace for VR
entry.summary: My current project is a 1:1 copy of my bedroom and computer room. I would like to build little VR experiments within my room. I could also augment items in my room, such as removing the roof to see the stars at night.
entry.content: My current project is a 1:1 copy of my bedroom and computer room. I would like to build little VR experiments within my room. I could also augment items in my room, such as removing the roof to see the stars at night.
